ticket.title: Add negate(a) to the toy calculator
acceptance_criteria: Function signature is `negate(a: int) -> int` and returns `-a` for any integer input.
Edge cases covered: negate(0) returns 0; negate(-7) returns 7.
A pytest test `test_negate_returns_negation` lives in `tests/test_calculator.py` and pins both edge cases.

plan.title: Add negate(a)
plan.detail: Append negate(a: int) -> int to src/calculator.py
